note: Representative iPad-emulation journey metrics under 4x CPU throttle. Regenerated on every CI run of `npm run test:emulation`; the live run attaches this report plus the offline-boot / journey / portrait-lock screenshots as PR artifacts. Emulated, not physically iPad-validated. Frame budgets are regression backstops calibrated to CI, not a smoothness certification.
device: iPad Pro 11 (1194x834 CSS, DPR 2, touch, spoofed Mobile Safari UA) on Chromium

github_2core_ci.note: ~20 fps throttled cadence; identical across run + retry
